overview: Giant Spider is a Normal-class Beast/Giant/Insect monster found in Goblin Cave, Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 100 HP, 16 physical damage, 180 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 4, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 1 attack, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack at 180% ratio (288 base damage). Sight range 750, combat radius 100. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Install Cob Web Floor Nightmare.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Cob Web Slow
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Cob Web Slow icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Cob Web Slow Nightmare
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Cob Web Slow Nightmare icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Poison
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Poison icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Restraint
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Restraint icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Fire
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Install Cob Web Floor Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Install Cob Web Floor Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 750 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 750 units, loses target at 1200 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 100, ability check distance 150
strategies.description: Combat area radius 100. Ability check distance 150. Ability attack delay: 0.3s.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Install Cob Web Floor Nightmare

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 750 units. Loses target at 1200 units.
